_comment: Version: 7 | Path: ay_platform_ui/package.json | Description: Next.js 16 frontend with runtime-config bootstrap + auth shell + 4-tier test strategy. v7 (2026-04-29) adds `test:system` script (Playwright against a real running stack via `playwright.system.config.ts`, no mocks). Pre-req : `e2e_stack.sh dev`. v6 pinned `dev` to webpack mode (Turbopack rejects bake+symlink). v5 added `lint:fix`. v4 added Vitest + RTL + jsdom + MSW + Playwright ; coverage gate 80% line. All deps pinned to exact versions per user request (Next 16.2.4, React 19.2.5, TS 6.0.3, Vitest 4.1.5, Playwright 1.59.1, Biome 2.4.13, jsdom 29). Engines: Node.js 25.
name: ay_platform_ui

scripts.lint: biome check app lib components tests
scripts.lint:fix: biome check --write app lib components tests
scripts.format: biome format --write app lib components tests
scripts.ci: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test:coverage
